heroTitle: Authentic Italian dining in the heart of Stockholm
heroText: Bella Napoli serves fresh pasta, wood-fired pizza, and classic Italian dishes in a warm and welcoming setting.
aboutText: Our restaurant combines traditional Italian flavors with a modern dining experience for lunch, dinner, and special occasions.

services.title: Dine-In
services.description: Enjoy a full Italian dining experience in our restaurant.

services.title: Takeaway
services.description: Order your favorite dishes for pickup.

services.title: Private Events
services.description: Host birthdays, team dinners, and celebrations with us.

faq.question: Do you take table reservations?
faq.answer: Yes, you can reserve a table through our booking link or by phone.

faq.question: Do you offer vegetarian options?
faq.answer: Yes, we have several vegetarian dishes on the menu.
